systems.system_notes: Stemless anatomic shoulder arthroplasty platform built around a cage screw humeral fixation concept with streamlined instrumentation.

trays.tray_notes: Official Arthrex materials describe a streamlined single-tray instrumentation workflow for the Eclipse shoulder system.

components.component_notes: Official Arthrex materials describe metaphyseal humeral fixation using the Eclipse cage screw concept.
Official product materials describe modular humeral head options within the Eclipse shoulder construct.
Official product materials describe compatible glenoid component options for anatomic shoulder reconstruction.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Public Arthrex Eclipse pages in this pass describe the system, fixation concept, and tray workflow but do not expose a public implant code table.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or ordering guide pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
